label: Before Sleep
curationNote: Seed bundles the canonical Quran-referenced recitations (Ayat al-Kursi, three Quls, last two ayahs of Al-Baqarah) attested in Bukhari 5017, Bukhari 5010, and Muslim 808. Additional hadith-derived supplications (Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya, tasbih 33x, etc.) require license-audited curation before shipping.

duas.source: Quran 2:255 (Ayat al-Kursi) — recited before sleep, see Bukhari 5010
Quran 2:285-286 (last two ayahs of Al-Baqarah) — sufficient for the one who recites them at night, see Bukhari 5008
Quran 112 (Al-Ikhlas) — blown into cupped hands and wiped over the body, see Bukhari 5017
Quran 113 (Al-Falaq) — blown into cupped hands and wiped over the body, see Bukhari 5017
Quran 114 (An-Nas) — blown into cupped hands and wiped over the body, see Bukhari 5017
